title: A Voyage to Arcturus
description: A Voyage to Arcturus — knowledge fragments for AI agents

memes.label: About This Wiki
memes.description: A knowledge wiki for "A Voyage to Arcturus" — this page is auto-generated from book metadata

memes.label: 'Table of Contents'
memes.description: 'Table of Contents'

memes.label: "Alppain"
memes.description: "The second, invisible sun of Tormance — a blue star whose light reveals deeper spiritual realities and catalyzes Maskull's metaphysical transformation."

memes.label: "Backhouse"
memes.description: "The professional medium hired by Montague Faull to conduct the séance that transports Maskull and Nightspore to Tormance"

memes.label: "Barey"
memes.description: "A mountainous lowland region of Tormance illuminated by two suns — a place of heightened perception where Maskull experiences physical and spiritual intensification."

memes.label: "Blodsombre"
memes.description: "The twilight interval on Tormance between the setting of Branchspell and the rising of Alppain — a period of shadow and transition marked by distinctive atmospheric effects."

memes.label: "Branchspell"
memes.description: "The primary sun of the planet Tormance — a white, intensely hot star whose rays shape the physical and sensory experience of all life on the planet."

memes.label: "Breve"
memes.description: "A forehead organ on Tormance that enables silent thought exchange between beings"

memes.label: "Broodviol"
memes.description: "The wisest man in Tormance — a gnarled, rugged old man dwelling in the Wombflash Forest, consulted for his profound insight."

memes.label: "Catice"
memes.description: "Spadevil's associate and successor to Maulger — a harsh-voiced figure who challenges Maskull to prove his faith through physical ordeal."

memes.label: "Corpang"
memes.description: "A religious seeker and Maskull's companion through the later chapters of the journey, representing the intellectual approach to spiritual truth."

memes.label: "Crimtyphon"
memes.description: "Oceaxe's former lover, a violent figure whose murder by Maskull marks a crucial moral turning point in the early journey across Tormance."

memes.label: "Crystalman"
memes.description: "The demiurgic deity of Tormance whose face appears in the sky — creator of the material world, worshipped with affection by its inhabitants, but recognized as a mask concealing the higher reality of Muspel"

memes.label: "Digrung"
memes.description: "A nervous traveller from Matterplay whose colour keeps changing — reminding Maskull of Joiwind — encountered on the way to Poolingdred."

memes.label: "Disscourn"
memes.description: "The highest point in Ifdawn, a mountain summit where Spadevil lives and Maskull confronts the severest form of Tormance's moral philosophy."

memes.label: "Dreamsinter"
memes.description: "A mysterious being encountered by Maskull who identifies himself as serving Surtur and guides Maskull through a musical visionary experience"

memes.label: "Earthrid"
memes.description: "A mysterious musician whose instrument conjures astonishing realities — and plays men to death."

memes.label: "Faceny"
memes.description: "A metaphysical source entity in the world of Tormance — the being from whose thoughts all life and all individual streams of existence flow."

memes.label: "Montague Faull"
memes.description: "The South American merchant who hosts the séance at Prolands that opens the novel, setting in motion the entire cosmic journey through his curiosity about the supernatural."

memes.label: "Front Matter"
memes.description: "Front matter of A Voyage to Arcturus"

memes.label: "Gangnet"
memes.description: "A native of Barey encountered by Maskull and Krag in Chapter 43; a prescient, graceful figure who represents emotional wisdom and affection in contrast to Krag's harshness."

memes.label: "Gleameil"
memes.description: "Polecrab's wife, a devoted mother living on the shore of the Sinking Sea who parts tragically from her family to travel with Maskull."

memes.label: "Gnawl Water"
memes.description: "Nourishing water found on Tormance with restorative properties"

memes.label: "Hator"
memes.description: "The legendary founder of Sant, who lived thousands of years ago and established the ascetic doctrines that Spadevil later carries forward."

memes.label: "Haunte"
memes.description: "A sardonic hunter from Sarclash who guides Maskull toward Sullenbode, embodying the amoral pursuit of pleasure and experience."

memes.label: "Ifdawn"
memes.description: "A mountainous region of Tormance bordering the Ifdawn Marest, characterized by quick decisions and harsh natural beauty, lit by the planet's second sun Alppain."

memes.label: "Jale"
memes.description: "A new primary color perceived on Tormance — tranquil and peaceful"

memes.label: "Mrs. Jameson"
memes.description: "A guest at Montague Faull's séance at Prolands whose sisterly connection to Faull and dramatic fainting spell mark her as a register of the séance's emotional and supernatural intensity."

memes.label: "Joiwind"
memes.description: "First being encountered by Maskull on Tormance — embodiment of love and self-sacrifice"

memes.label: "Krag"
memes.description: "Maskull's violent guide — Surtur's agent who brings suffering as the necessary path to spiritual awakening, appearing at the novel's beginning and its apocalyptic end"

memes.label: "Leehallfae"
memes.description: "A phantom-like being of the third sex from Phaeon who guides Maskull through the later metaphysical landscapes, explaining the nature of Faceny and embodying the novel's most radical departure from human sexual and ontological categories."

memes.label: "Lusion Plain"
memes.description: "A vast plain on Tormance where Maskull travels with Joiwind and later has a significant dream-vision encounter with Shaping."

memes.label: "Magn"
memes.description: "A sensory organ grown by Maskull on Tormance that enables emotional perception and direct feeling of others' inner states"

memes.label: "Maskull"
memes.description: "The protagonist of A Voyage to Arcturus — a seeker who journeys across Tormance, growing new sensory organs and encountering philosophical worldviews, whose transformation through suffering allegorizes the path to spiritual enlightenment"

memes.label: "Matterplay"
memes.description: "A region of Tormance between Ifdawn and Sant, homeland of Digrung, characterized by a culture that inverts conventional moral judgments — where the world's most shameful events are considered most honorable."

memes.label: "Muspel"
memes.description: "The transcendent realm of ultimate reality beyond Crystalman's material world, associated with light and truth"

memes.label: "Nightspore"
memes.description: "Mysterious companion of Maskull associated with Muspel — a silent, knowing figure"

memes.label: "Oceaxe"
memes.description: "A predatory female figure encountered on the Lusion Plain, who embodies dangerous femininity and the lure of sensual attachment."

memes.label: "Panawe"
memes.description: "Joiwind's husband — a figure of pure, chaste wisdom who walks on water and never lies, embodying spiritual purity and detachment."

memes.label: "Poigns"
memes.description: "Organs that explore the inward nature of things"

memes.label: "Polecrab"
memes.description: "A rough fisherman of Matterplay who trains sea-creatures, embodying the material and sensual mode of existence — simple, physical, and unreflective."

memes.label: "Poolingdred"
memes.description: "A cup-shaped mountain settlement on Tormance, Joiwind's birthplace and Maskull's first destination after arriving on the planet."

memes.label: "Probes"
memes.description: "Advanced sensory organs on Tormance — 'the gates opening into a new world' — the highest form of perceptual organ enabling direct spiritual vision beyond self-interest."

memes.label: "Sant"
memes.description: "A high plateau region on Tormance, founded by Hator thousands of years ago — a destination of pilgrimage where suffering souls seek relief and Maskull confronts the deepest truths of his journey."

memes.label: "Shaping"
memes.description: "The creative principle that formed the material world of Tormance — associated with Crystalman, opposed by Surtur, and worshipped by the planet's inhabitants as a benevolent presence"

memes.label: "Slofork"
memes.description: "A self-proclaimed sorcerer encountered by Maskull in the Sant Levels who challenges him to a contest of wills"

memes.label: "Sorb"
memes.description: "A forehead organ that, when covered, allows the 'new law' of duty to flow into consciousness"

memes.label: "Spadevil"
memes.description: "A prophet of duty who transforms Maskull's moral perception by covering his sorb — the character who embodies the philosophy of the 'new law'"

memes.label: "Starkness"
memes.description: "The remote Scottish observatory where Maskull, Nightspore, and Krag gather before departing for Tormance — the threshold between Earth and the cosmic journey"

memes.label: "Sullenbode"
memes.description: "A woman of legendary beauty whose encounter transforms both herself and those who seek her — the culminating female figure in Maskull's journey."

memes.label: "Surtur"
memes.description: "The mysterious transcendent being associated with Muspel and pain, who may be identical with or opposed to Crystalman"

memes.label: "Swaylone's Island"
memes.description: "A haunted island on the Sinking Sea, site of Earthrid's death-music and the legendary tragedy of the musician Swaylone."

memes.label: "Tentacle"
memes.description: "A whip-like organ that buds from the region of the heart on Tormance — the organ of emotional connection through which beings share love and inner feeling by physical contact."

memes.label: "Threal"
memes.description: "A northern region of Tormance, homeland of Earthrid and a land of mystics — where the mystery of existence is learned from birth and Maskull's final terrestrial destination."

memes.label: "Tormance"
memes.description: "The alien planet orbiting the star Arcturus where Maskull's transformative pilgrimage unfolds — a world of strange sensory organs, philosophical beings, and the visible face of Crystalman in the sky"

memes.label: "Mrs. Trent"
memes.description: "The medium at Faull's séance in Hampstead whose apparent trance marks the first intrusion of the supernatural into the novel's mundane opening, precipitating the cosmic journey that follows."

memes.label: "Trifork"
memes.description: "The three-pronged symbol of Hator's philosophical system — representing hatred of pleasure (stem), disentanglement from the world (first fork), power over the deluded (second fork), and the vigour of ascetic discipline (third fork)."

memes.label: "Tydomin"
memes.description: "Complex figure associated with moral transformation and the transmutation of guilt, encountered in the Disscourn region of Tormance."

memes.label: "Ulfure"
memes.description: "A new primary color perceived on Tormance — wild and painful"

memes.label: "Wombflash Forest"
memes.description: "A vast ancient forest on Tormance, home to the planet's wisest inhabitants and site of Maskull's early philosophical encounters."
